text: [Personal Loan] Personal & Business Loans: If you are looking for an unsecured business or personal loan, you have come to the right place. Chola Consumer and Small Enterprise Loans (CSEL) presents you a wide range of loan products without asking for a collateral security for your loan. Chola's business and personal loans support budding entrepreneurs and aspiring professionals to achieve their goals

text: [Personal Loan] Features & Benefits > Frequently Asked Questions: What is CSEL Loan? Consumer & Small Enterprise Loans (CSEL) is a division of Chola that offers collateral-free Personal, Professional and Business loans. Who can benefit from CSEL? Salaried Individuals, Self-employed Professionals and Business Owners. What is the interest rate? Our interest rates are competitive as per market standards. What is the maximum loan amount for CSEL? We offer unsecured loans up to Rs. 35 Lakh. What is the maximum tenure? The maximum tenure is 60 months. Is external guarantor needed to get a loan? No
section: Features & Benefits > Frequently Asked Questions

text: external guarantor is required. What is the expected time frame for loan disbursal? Our quick and easy process guarantees loan disbursal within 24 to 48 hours of approval. Which professionals can avail CSEL loan? + Doctors (MBBS, BMS and above) + Chartered Accountants Is collateral required to avail a loan? No collateral is required to avail Consumer and Small Enterprise Loans. What are the documents required to avail a loan? • Proof of identity • Address proof • Proof of income • Proof of business (applicable only for self-employed) Why should I choose Chola CSEL Loans? • Hassle-free
section: Features & Benefits > Frequently Asked Questions

How do I get my loan-related queries resolved? Call our customer grievance redressal toll-free number 1800-102-4565.
